Shows users history of events they have interacted in Allows user to view details of events they have interacted in Accessed from profile

EventPreview - Class in com.example.junimoapp.Organizer
Allows you to see the preview of an event before it is published - How it will look to users Organizer can go back to editing or upload the event back on the create/edit screen
